summary: Iteration 70 - Farmer Registration Flow with Mandatory PIN and Activation Tracking. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard has activation widget with stats cards, progress bar, and pending members list with reminder buttons. MembersPage has activation stats banner with 5 stat cards. Add Member modal has REQUIRED PIN field (4 digits) and hectares field. Success dialog shows auto-generated code_planteur. SMS reminder endpoint is MOCKED.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings for select/option elements - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: cooperative_members.py: PIN code is now MANDATORY - returns 422 if missing (Pydantic validation) or 400 if invalid format
cooperative_members.py: hectares field added to CoopMemberCreate model and stored as hectares_approx
cooperative_members.py: GET /api/cooperative/members/activation-stats returns comprehensive stats including total, activated, pending, rate, pin_configured_count, code_planteur_count
cooperative_members.py: POST /api/cooperative/members/{id}/send-reminder sends MOCKED SMS and updates last_reminder_sent timestamp
cooperative_members.py: Route ordering fixed - /members/activation-stats is BEFORE /members/{member_id} to avoid route conflict
Dashboard.jsx: Activation tracking widget shows 5 stat cards, progress bar, and pending members list with reminder buttons
MembersPage.jsx: Activation stats banner with Total, Activés, Non activés, PIN USSD, and progress bar
MembersPage.jsx: Add member modal has REQUIRED PIN field with validation and hectares field
MembersPage.jsx: Success dialog shows code_planteur and PIN status after member creation
cooperativeApi.js: getActivationStats() and sendActivationReminder() methods added
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing with unique phone numbers (+22505990XXXXX to +22505998XXXXX format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Farmer registration flow complete: 1) POST /api/cooperative/members requires PIN (4 digits) - returns 422 if missing, 400 if invalid. 2) Member created with auto-generated code_planteur (GL-XXX-NNNNN format), hashed PIN, and hectares_approx. 3) ussd_registrations entry created for USSD recognition. 4) GET /api/cooperative/members/activation-stats returns stats with pending_activation list. 5) POST /api/cooperative/members/{id}/send-reminder sends MOCKED SMS. 6) Dashboard has activation widget with stats and reminder buttons. 7) MembersPage has stats banner and Add Member modal with PIN/hectares fields. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
mocked_api_note.SMS Reminder: MOCKED - reminder logged, last_reminder_sent updated, but no actual SMS sent
